message.content:
@startuml
participant "User Agent" as UA
box "Wallet"
participant "Frontend" as FE
participant "Backend" as BE
end box
box "Issuer"
participant "Metadata" as META
participant "Web Site" as WS
participant "Token Endpoint" as TE
participant "Credential Endpoint" as CE
end box

UA -> WS : get credential

note over UA, CE : prepare credential issuance

WS -> UA : Issuance Initiation Request\n(pre-authz-code, credential_type, expected_key_types, issuer)

UA -> FE : Issuance Initiation Request\n(pre-authz-code, credential_type, expected_key_types, issuer)

FE -> BE : gen DPoP key
BE --> FE : 

FE -> BE : gen DPoP proof for issuer token endpoint
BE --> FE : 

FE -> BE : get nonce (for app attestation)
BE --> FE : nonce

FE -> BE : obtain app attestation (nonce)
BE --> FE : 

FE -> BE : get assertion for code exchange\n(hash(pre-authz-code), app attestation)

BE -> BE : check app_attestation

BE -> BE : generate assertion\n(iss=wallet backend, pre_authz_code_hash, client_id)

BE --> FE : assertion

FE -> META : get issuer metadata

FE -> TE : token request\n(pre-authz-code, pin, client_id, assertion, dpop_proof)

note over FE, TE : wallet authenticates with issuer as OAuth Client using the assertion issued by its backend (RFC 7523)\nissuer checks wallet backend id and key against trust registry

note over FE, TE : Token Endpoint validates pre-authorized code and creates corresponding access token

TE --> FE : token response\n(access_token, c_nonce)

FE -> BE : gen key : key, key_attestation
BE --> FE : 

FE -> BE : create proof of posssion (c_nonce)
BE --> FE : 

FE -> BE : create DPoP proof for issuance request
BE --> FE : 

FE -> CE : issue credential\n(access_token, credential_type, format, proof, key_policy, dpop_proof)

note over FE, CE : Credential Endpoint Token checks whether the access token is good for requested credential type and\nwhether the proof of possession is valid

CE --> FE : credential response (credential, format)

@enduml
